summary: Frontend-only testing completed for Course Module Page improvements. All 7 requested features verified and working correctly. The steps block with 3-step visual indicators, state transitions (grey circles to green checkmarks with strikethrough), disabled/enabled complete button, completion success block, and next module enablement all function as expected.
test_credentials: No credentials needed - set localStorage 'je_course_purchased' to 'true'
seed_data_creation: Clear localStorage keys 'je_module_progress' and 'je_module_comments' to test fresh state
context_for_next_testing_agent: Course module improvement testing complete. Key data-testids: steps-block (instruction block), step-1/step-2/step-3 (individual steps), mark-complete-btn (completion button), steps-complete (success block). Navigation requires: 1) Click Ingresar (Alumno default), 2) Set localStorage je_course_purchased=true, 3) Navigate via drawer to Curso, 4) Click on module. localStorage keys: je_course_purchased, je_module_progress, je_module_comments.

steps_block_visible.details: Steps block (data-testid='steps-block') is visible between video and comments section. Shows 3 steps with instruction text 'Para completar este modulo debes:'

step_1_state_change.details: Initially step 1 shows grey Circle icon. After clicking 'Marcar como visto', step 1 shows green CheckCircle icon with text-success class and line-through strikethrough

step_2_state_change.details: After submitting comment (50+ chars), step 2 shows green CheckCircle with strikethrough text 'Escribir un comentario (minimo 50 caracteres)'

complete_button_disabled.details: Button (data-testid='mark-complete-btn') is disabled with Lock icon and text 'Completa los pasos anteriores' when steps 1 and 2 are not completed

complete_button_enabled.details: After completing steps 1 (watched) and 2 (commented), button becomes enabled with CheckCircle icon, accent color (btn-accent), and text 'Marcar leccion como completada'

completion_flow.details: Clicking enabled complete button: steps-block disappears (rendered conditionally), replaced by success block (data-testid='steps-complete') showing 'Modulo completado' with green styling

next_module_button_enabled.details: After completion, 'Siguiente módulo' button becomes enabled with btn-accent styling, no longer showing Lock icon or 'Completa este módulo primero' text

data_testid_verified.steps-block: Instruction block with 3 steps - visible when !progress.completed
data_testid_verified.step-1: Step 1: Ver el video completo - shows Circle (pending) or CheckCircle (done)
data_testid_verified.step-2: Step 2: Escribir un comentario - shows Circle (pending) or CheckCircle (done)
data_testid_verified.step-3: Step 3: Marcar la leccion como completada - always shows Circle (manual action)
data_testid_verified.mark-complete-btn: Main completion button - disabled when steps 1+2 incomplete, enabled when ready
data_testid_verified.steps-complete: Success block - visible when progress.completed is true

visual_states_verified.pending_step: Grey Circle icon, normal text color (text-foreground)
visual_states_verified.completed_step: Green CheckCircle icon, green text (text-success), strikethrough (line-through)
visual_states_verified.disabled_button: Lock icon, text 'Completa los pasos anteriores', disabled attribute
visual_states_verified.enabled_button: CheckCircle icon, text 'Marcar leccion como completada', btn-accent styling
visual_states_verified.success_block: Green border (border-success/30), green background (bg-success/5), CheckCircle icon

localStorage_keys_used.je_course_purchased: Required to access course modules (must be 'true')
localStorage_keys_used.je_module_progress: Stores watched/commented/completed state per module ID
localStorage_keys_used.je_module_comments: Stores user comments per module ID
